title: polypodium multifolium
intro: Polypodium multifolium, also known as Chinese leopards' bane or multifoliate polypody, is a species of fern native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polypodium multifolium include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried powder, and is also used in modern herbal preparations in the form of capsules, tablets, and tinctures.
